issues.description: Missing condition: activation requires resting 1 DON!! card and this Character. DSL must include cost/condition.
SearchDeck filter incomplete: must specify {Blackbeard Pirates} type filter, not 'Any'. Card type restriction is essential to effect.
Missing action: 'up to 1' reveal and search is incomplete without the 'place rest at bottom' mechanic. Need second action or composite SearchDeck with reordering.
Missing cost specification: activation requires Rest action on DON!! cards and this Character before search can occur.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [Activate: Main] You may rest 1 of your DON!! cards and this Character: Look at 5 cards from the top of your deck; reveal up to 1 {Blackbeard Pirates} type card and add it to your hand. Then, place the rest at the bottom of your deck in any order.
